description: A multiplayer collectible card game featuring real-time online matchmaking, card collection management, and a secure virtual economy system.
name: Millionaire Deal
highlights: Led and coordinated development from prototype to production, managing card gameplay, systems, and server infrastructure.
Developed scalable real-time multiplayer, ranked matchmaking, and user management backend using Unity and Photon.
Planned and built core systems like card stores, virtual currencies, and 50+ unique animated action cards.
